title: Combining Frictionless Drop with Friction Slide
body: A $$2$$ kg block is released from rest at the top of a frictionless ramp $$4.5$$ $$m$$ high. After leaving the ramp it slides on a rough horizontal surface with coefficient of kinetic friction $$0.5$$ until it stops. Use g $$=$$ $$9.8$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$.
lesson: 8. Potential Energy and Conservation of Energy
